name: Verify that the POST Create API will fail when exiting Unique Id and unique id uri is used in the request
description: /home/runner/work/immunisation-fhir-api/immunisation-fhir-api/tests/e2e_automation/features/APITests/create.feature: Verify that the POST Create API will fail when exiting Unique Id and unique_id_uri is used in the request
descriptionHtml: /home/runner/work/immunisation-fhir-api/immunisation-fhir-api/tests/e2e_automation/features/APITests/create.feature: Verify that the POST Create API will fail when exiting Unique Id and unique_id_uri is used in the request

testStage.description: /home/runner/work/immunisation-fhir-api/immunisation-fhir-api/tests/e2e_automation/features/APITests/create.feature: Verify that the POST Create API will fail when exiting Unique Id and unique_id_uri is used in the request

attachments.name: Step Passed: Valid json payload is created
Step Passed: Trigger the post create request
Step Passed: The request will be successful with the status code '201'
Step Passed: The location key and Etag in header will contain the Immunization Id and version
Step Passed: The X-Request-ID and X-Correlation-ID keys in header will populate correctly
Step Passed: The imms event table will be populated with the correct data for 'created' event
Step Passed: The delta table will be populated with the correct data for created event
Step Passed: MNS event will be triggered with correct data for created event
Step Passed: Trigger another post create request with same unique_id and unique_id_uri
Step Passed: The request will be unsuccessful with the status code '422'
Step Passed: The Response JSONs should contain correct error message for 'duplicate'
Step Passed: MNS event will not be triggered for the event
